title: Experienced Artificial Intelligence Engineer | Fès (Morocco)
description:
Company culture :

Alten Maroc is defined by a deeply collaborative culture, focused on people, trust, and strong team support, with hands-on managers who guide and develop talent.

This environment is enhanced by a strong drive for innovation, encouraging creativity, initiative, and experimentation across projects.

A structured and disciplined organization ensures efficiency, rigor, and quality in engineering delivery.

Performance and ambition are part of the culture as well, supporting collective success while maintaining a positive and caring atmosphere.

Job :

We are looking for a motivated Artificial Intelligence engineer, passionate about innovation, and ready to take on complex technical challenges. The ideal candidate has experience in developing and testing AI solutions, with strong programming skills and an awareness of ethical issues.

Responsibilities:

Design, develop, and optimize AI algorithms to meet business needs.
Collaborate with multidisciplinary teams to integrate AI solutions into existing systems.
Perform rigorous tests to ensure the performance and reliability of AI models.
Ensure compliance with best practices regarding ethics and bias reduction in AI solutions.

Required profile :

Profile sought

- Master's degree (Bac+5) in engineering or computer science

Experience: Minimum 3 years of experience (ideally 4 years) in a similar AI role, with development and testing skills.

Required technical skills:

Proficiency in programming languages such as Python, C, or Java.
Experience in developing and testing machine learning models.
Knowledge of cloud platforms (AWS, Google Cloud, Azure) for model deployment and scalability.
Knowledge of AI frameworks like TensorFlow, PyTorch, etc.
Advantageous:
Skills in mathematics (linear algebra, statistics) and data interpretation.
Proficiency in data analysis tools (SQL, pandas) and visualization tools (Tableau).

Personal qualities sought:

Strong team spirit and ability to work independently.
Intellectual curiosity and ability for continuous learning in a rapidly evolving field.
Great problem-solving skills and a taste for challenges.
Awareness of ethical issues in AI and mastery of best practices for limiting bias.
Motivation and willingness to fully invest in ambitious projects.
Communication skills and ability to explain complex technical concepts.
